based_on.manual_overlap_review: source refs P0051, P0052, P0056, P0067, P0074, P0096 and community refs from final DB+comments passport

corpus_policy.pruning_summary: Imported full export and Telegram API comments, then pruned all posts before 2025 because the candidate passport did not use pre-2025 sources as decision evidence and the AI coding/tooling landscape has shifted materially.

routing_notes: Strong fit for advanced AI-assisted development, SDD, AI-TDD, SGR, Claude Code/Codex CLI workflows, context engineering, and safety hooks.
Use as a primary precision source for enterprise-grade agentic engineering and large-codebase context workflows.
Useful for model-to-task choices in coding, especially when the user asks which model to use for architecture, execution, debugging, or UI work.
Do not route as a beginner ChatGPT/tutorial source, generic AI news source, creative/multimodal source, or broad business-adoption expert.
Filter CodeAlive promotional framing while preserving the underlying context-engineering evidence.
recommended_manifest_caveat: accepted as advanced AI-assisted development / SDD / AI-TDD / SGR / Claude Code and Codex CLI workflow / context-engineering / safety-hooks expert; overlap-heavy with existing coding-agent experts, so route as a precision source for enterprise-grade agentic engineering rather than generic AI coding advice
